description: List dependency vulnerability alerts from Dependabot for a repository via GitHub REST.

classification.description: Comma-separated vulnerability classifications, such as malware or general.

ecosystem.description: Filter by package ecosystem, such as npm, gomod, pip, or maven.

epss_percentage.description: Filter by EPSS percentage, such as >0.5, <=0.1, or 0.1..0.9.

has.description: Filter by available alert metadata. Currently GitHub supports patch.

assignee.description: Filter by assignees, such as octocat, octocat,hubot, *, or none.

before.description: Cursor for results before this value from the Link header.

after.description: Cursor for results after this value from the Link header.
